channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democrats blame and rush to replace former candidate Graham Platner after scandal
item.description: Following a rape accusation, Graham Platner withdrew from the Maine Senate race, prompting Democrats to urgently seek a new candidate.

item.title: Democrats Dropped Platner Only Due to Losing Prospects, Despite Past Support for Extremist Views
item.description: Platner's departure does not signal a shift; the party continues to back radical, anti-American figures.

item.title: AIPAC Invests $1.2 Million to Block Cori Bush's Return to Congress
item.description: The pro-Israel lobby is prioritizing preventing the former congresswoman and democratic socialist from regaining her seat.

item.title: Iran Falls Out of Favor with Trump Administration
item.description: The previously described 'very rational people' may have reignited tensions with the United States.
